tasks.task_goal: Loosen a rusted hex nut on a backyard gate hinge to realign the gate
tasks.expected_outcome: The nut backs off counterclockwise, reducing clamping force so the hinge can be adjusted
required_tool_attributes: adjustable jaw sized to hex flats
parallel, flat jaws for full-face contact
rigid steel handle for torque transmission
ergonomic grip for applying reverse torque
low jaw play to prevent rounding
unconventional_tools: Small C-clamp tightened onto the nut and used as an improvised wrench
F-style bar clamp gripping the hex flats and turned as a handle
Locking pliers with stacked coin or washer shims to present parallel, flat jaws on the nut
opposite_tool_attributes: non-adjustable, wrong-sized or rounded/serrated jaws that aren’t parallel, giving only point contact
flexible or soft handle/body (rubber/plastic) that bends or deforms under torque instead of rigid steel
high jaw play/loose hinge tolerance causing sloppy fit and rounding of hex flats

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a stuck lid on a pickle jar
tasks.expected_outcome: The lid unscrews and the vacuum seal breaks, allowing the jar to open
required_tool_attributes: high-friction rubber surface
flexible pad that conforms to lid contours
sufficient diameter coverage for grip
enables strong hand-applied rotational force
unconventional_tools: rubber dishwashing glove
mouse pad (rubber backing side)
wide rubber band(s) wrapped around the lid
opposite_tool_attributes: slick, low-friction surface (e.g., polished or lubricated)
rigid, non-conforming shape that cannot wrap around the lid
minimal contact area that fails to cover the lid’s diameter and distribute grip

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the seatpost clamp bolt on a bicycle to adjust saddle height
tasks.expected_outcome: Clamp tension relaxes and the seatpost can slide
required_tool_attributes: 5 mm hex tip that matches the bolt socket
hardened steel to resist twisting
L-shaped form for leverage
non-slip grip surface
unconventional_tools: 5 mm hex driver bit clamped in locking pliers as an improvised L-handle
T25 Torx L-key inserted into the 5 mm hex socket (light torque only)
4 mm hex key wrapped tightly with a strip of aluminum can to build up to ~5 mm
opposite_tool_attributes: Non-hexagonal or wrong-size tip that doesn't match a 5 mm socket
Soft, flexible material that twists or deforms under torque instead of hardened steel
Straight or floppy form without L-shaped leverage and with a smooth, slippery grip

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a stuck 77 mm camera lens filter ring
tasks.expected_outcome: The filter rotates free from lens threads without damage
required_tool_attributes: thin, circular gripping band sized for the filter
non-marring, high-friction contact surface
leveraging handles for even reverse torque
clamp action to maintain grip under load
unconventional_tools: Small embroidery hoop (≈3 in/75–80 mm) lined with a strip of bicycle inner tube or rubber glove, tightened and used as a clamp ring to twist the filter
Worm-drive hose clamp (≈76–90 mm) with a silicone baking mat or inner-tube liner, snugged gently and turned using the screw housing as a handle
Camera neck strap or leather belt used as a loop/strap wrench over a silicone jar gripper pad for friction, pulling both ends evenly to apply torque
opposite_tool_attributes: bulky, non-circular contact area that cannot encircle or fit a 77 mm ring
smooth, hard, or lubricated low-friction surfaces that slip or mar the filter
no clamping or leverage (single-point prying or elastic grip that opens under load)

tasks.task_goal: Loosen an automotive oil filter during an oil change
tasks.expected_outcome: The filter unscrews, releasing its seal from the engine
required_tool_attributes: adjustable metal band to wrap the filter
textured inner surface for friction
long rigid handle for leverage
self-tightening action under reverse torque
unconventional_tools: Leather belt looped around the filter with a screwdriver or ratchet handle as the lever
Perforated metal plumber's tape (metal strapping) cinched into a loop with a bolt and turned with a socket wrench
Ratcheting tie-down strap (cargo strap) wrapped around the filter using the ratchet handle for leverage
opposite_tool_attributes: non-adjustable, stretchy loop that loosens under load instead of tightening
smooth or lubricated inner surface that reduces friction against the filter
short, flexible or no handle that bends and cannot transmit torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a corroded garden hose coupling from an outdoor spigot
tasks.expected_outcome: The coupling backs off the faucet threads so the hose can be removed
required_tool_attributes: adjustable jaw opening for various diameters
serrated jaws for bite on metal fittings
long handles to amplify reverse torque
angled head for wall clearance
unconventional_tools: leather belt with a screwdriver or dowel as a makeshift strap wrench
ratchet tie-down strap cinched around the coupling and used as a lever
stainless steel barbecue tongs
opposite_tool_attributes: fixed, non-adjustable narrow jaw opening
smooth, non-serrated gripping surfaces
short or flexible handles that cannot transmit high reverse torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the tiny set screw retaining a door knob trim collar
tasks.expected_outcome: The set screw turns out slightly, releasing the collar for removal
required_tool_attributes: narrow, flat blade that fits the slot snugly
rigid shaft for precise torque transmission
rotating cap or slim handle for control
textured grip to prevent slipping
unconventional_tools: metal nail file (from a manicure set)
single-edge razor blade wrapped in tape for grip
thin house key edge
opposite_tool_attributes: wide, rounded, or non-flat tip that cannot seat in a narrow slotted screw
flexible or soft shaft that bends or twists instead of transmitting precise torque
bulky, smooth handle without a rotating cap or texture, prone to slipping

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a woodworking C-clamp to release a glued board after curing
tasks.expected_outcome: The screw backs out, relieving clamping pressure so the board can be removed
required_tool_attributes: crossbar handle providing leverage
knurled or shaped grip for traction
rigid threaded screw converting rotation to axial release
steel construction to handle torque
unconventional_tools: Large flathead screwdriver inserted through the clamp screw’s cross-hole to act as a temporary T-handle
L-shaped hex key (Allen wrench) used as a crossbar through the handle hole for leverage
Locking pliers (Vise-Grips) clamped onto the screw shaft or remaining handle to twist it free
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, rounded handle with no crossbar or texture, offering little leverage or traction
flexible, elastic shaft that twists or deforms instead of a rigid threaded screw converting rotation to axial motion
soft plastic or rubber construction that deforms under torque instead of strong steel

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the regulator nut on a propane tank to disconnect the hose
tasks.expected_outcome: The nut turns counterclockwise, freeing the regulator fitting from the tank valve
required_tool_attributes: accurately sized open jaws matching hex flats
slim head for access in tight spaces
hardened steel for high-torque loads
sufficient handle length for leverage
unconventional_tools: Claw hammer (using the V-notch of the claw on the hex flats)
Flat pry bar/wonder bar with nail-pulling slot
Large C-clamp or F-clamp tightened onto the hex flats
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded or wrong-sized jaws that don't match the nut's hex flats
bulky, thick head that cannot fit into the tight space around the regulator
soft, flexible material that deforms under torque instead of hardened steel

tasks.task_goal: Loosen lug nuts on a car wheel before lifting the vehicle
tasks.original_tool: breaker bar with 19 mm six-point socket
tasks.expected_outcome: Each lug nut breaks free, reducing clamping force so removal is easy
required_tool_attributes: long rigid handle for high reverse torque
six-point socket for full-face hex engagement
secure square-drive coupling
hardened, corrosion-resistant construction
unconventional_tools: 19 mm box-end wrench with a long steel pipe slipped over the handle (cheater bar)
Deep 3/4 in (≈19 mm) six-point socket clamped in locking pliers, extended with a jack handle or pipe
Large adjustable wrench tightened onto the lug nut with a metal pipe for added leverage
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible handle that cannot transmit high reverse torque
rounded or twelve-point/smooth contact surfaces instead of full-face six-point hex engagement
loose, non-locking coupling between handle and socket (no secure square drive)

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the mounting nut securing a kitchen faucet from under the sink
tasks.expected_outcome: The nut backs off, allowing the faucet to be lifted out or repositioned
required_tool_attributes: pivoting, spring-loaded jaws to grab hidden nuts
long, narrow shaft for deep reach
T-handle to apply rotational force in confined space
serrated jaws for reliable grip
unconventional_tools: long, spring-loaded BBQ tongs with scalloped jaws
leather belt used as a strap wrench with a screwdriver as a T-handle
ratchet tie-down strap used as a strap wrench (using the ratchet lever for torque)
opposite_tool_attributes: non-pivoting, non-spring, smooth jaws that cannot clamp
short, bulky shaft/head with poor deep reach
flexible/soft shaft without a T-handle, requiring a wide swing to apply torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the locknut on an angle grinder to change the cutting disc
tasks.expected_outcome: The locknut rotates free, releasing the disc from the spindle
required_tool_attributes: dual pins spaced to fit locknut holes
rigid handle to transmit counter-torque
thin profile to fit near the guard
non-slip grip for controlled rotation
unconventional_tools: needle-nose pliers
dinner fork
two small drill bits clamped in locking pliers
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth face or single contact point with no dual pins (or pins at the wrong spacing)
flexible or soft handle that bends/twists instead of transmitting torque
bulky/thick head that cannot fit near the grinder guard

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a decorative ceiling light fixture’s threaded retaining collar without marring it
tasks.expected_outcome: The collar unscrews, allowing the fixture canopy to drop for access
required_tool_attributes: flexible, non-marring strap that wraps the collar
self-tightening loop under reverse torque
handle for leverage in cramped positions
high-friction strap material
unconventional_tools: leather belt cinched through its buckle as a strap
bicycle inner tube strip twisted around a wooden spoon as a handle
loop-style resistance band (exercise band) used as a self-tightening wrap
opposite_tool_attributes: rigid, toothed metal jaws that bite into and mar finishes instead of a flexible, non-marring strap
grip that slips or loosens under reverse torque rather than self-tightening
bulky body with no slim handle for leverage in cramped spaces and a low-friction contact surface

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the kingpin nut on a skateboard to make the trucks turn more freely
tasks.expected_outcome: The nut backs off slightly, reducing bushing compression for looser steering
required_tool_attributes: correctly sized deep socket for hex nut
ergonomic T-shape for torque application
hardened steel socket to prevent rounding
compact profile for access near wheels
unconventional_tools: 1/2-inch magnetic nut driver bit (deep-well), turned by hand or in a T-handle
locking pliers (Vise-Grips) with narrow jaws
small adjustable wrench (crescent) with thin head
opposite_tool_attributes: incorrectly sized, shallow socket that cannot fully engage the hex nut
soft or flexible material (e.g., rubber/plastic) instead of hardened steel
bulky head or non-ergonomic handle lacking T-shape leverage and access

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the hose clamp securing a washing machine drain hose
tasks.expected_outcome: The clamp band slackens and the hose can be pulled off the fitting
required_tool_attributes: 1/4 inch hex socket end matching clamp screw
rigid shaft to reach recessed clamps
comfortable handle for steady torque
snug socket fit to prevent cam-out
unconventional_tools: Magnetic 1/4-inch hex bit holder used as a makeshift socket, turned with locking pliers or a small wrench
Multi-bit screwdriver handle’s 1/4-inch hex bit socket placed directly over the clamp’s 1/4-inch hex head
A sturdy coin (e.g., a quarter) used in the clamp screw’s slotted drive to back it off
opposite_tool_attributes: non-hex or wrong-size (not 1/4 inch) drive end that cannot engage the clamp screw
flexible or flimsy shaft that bends and can’t reach/hold alignment in a recess
loose or rounded socket fit that slips and cams out under torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a recessed faucet aerator for cleaning mineral buildup
tasks.expected_outcome: The aerator unthreads from the spout without damage
required_tool_attributes: keyed prongs sized to the aerator spline pattern
rigid ring body for even torque
durable material that resists deformation
compact profile to fit inside the spout
unconventional_tools: needle-nose pliers (tips inserted into the internal notches and turned)
stainless steel tweezers (fine tips engaged in the spline slots)
unplugged two-prong electrical plug (prongs fit the two internal tabs to twist)
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, non-keyed face lacking correctly sized prongs
flexible or soft body that bends instead of transmitting torque
bulky profile that cannot fit inside the faucet spout

tasks.task_goal: Loosen the jam nut on a threaded rod of a gate latch adjustment
tasks.expected_outcome: The jam nut turns free, allowing the adjustment nut to spin independently
required_tool_attributes: closed-loop hex engagement to prevent slippage
offset angled head for knuckle clearance
hardened steel for torque transmission
suitable handle length for leverage
unconventional_tools: Car lug wrench (tire iron) of matching size
Tubular spark plug wrench (tube spanner) used with a screwdriver or rod through the side holes
Keychain carabiner multi-tool with hex wrench cutouts
opposite_tool_attributes: open-ended, smooth contact without closed-loop hex engagement
inline, non-offset head that provides no knuckle clearance
soft, flexible construction with a very short handle that cannot transmit torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen an over-tightened microphone stand clutch knob
tasks.expected_outcome: The knob turns counterclockwise, relaxing the clutch so the stand height can adjust
required_tool_attributes: high-friction palm to increase grip on smooth surfaces
flexible fit to conform to knob shape
abrasion-resistant material for traction under load
enables full-hand rotational force
unconventional_tools: silicone jar opener pad or trivet
bicycle inner tube segment wrapped around the knob
neoprene can koozie slipped over the knob
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, low-friction contact surface that increases slipping on smooth plastic/metal
rigid, nonconforming shape that cannot wrap around or mold to the knob
fragile, tear-prone material that loses traction under load and cannot transmit full-hand torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a tiny Phillips screw securing an eyeglasses hinge
tasks.expected_outcome: The screw backs out slightly, reducing hinge tension for adjustment or repair
required_tool_attributes: correctly sized #00 cross-tip for positive engagement
rigid, narrow shaft for fine control
rotating end cap for fingertip torque
textured handle to prevent slipping
unconventional_tools: pushpin (thumbtack)
SIM card ejector pin
safety pin
opposite_tool_attributes: oversized or wrong-tip geometry (flat, Torx, or rounded) that cannot engage a #00 Phillips recess
flexible or bulky shaft that bends or cannot fit into the tight hinge area
smooth, non-rotating handle lacking grip and an end cap for controlled fingertip torque

tasks.task_goal: Loosen a stubborn lawn mower blade bolt to remove the blade for sharpening
tasks.original_tool: cordless impact wrench with 1/2 inch drive and appropriate socket
tasks.expected_outcome: The bolt breaks free and can be spun out by hand
required_tool_attributes: high-torque reverse setting to apply rapid reverse torque
1/2 inch square drive for impact-rated sockets
impact-rated six-point socket for secure hex engagement
ergonomic, grippable body to control recoil
unconventional_tools: telescoping lug wrench with 1/2 inch square drive and six-point socket
manual hammer-impact driver with a 1/2 inch square drive adapter
cordless drill with a hex-to-1/2 inch square drive adapter and six-point socket
opposite_tool_attributes: low-torque, non-impact drive with no reverse setting
1/4 inch hex or round output instead of a 1/2 inch square drive
non-impact-rated 12-point or rounded socket that cannot securely engage a hex fastener
